---
title: "Interview with Andreas Beyerlein"
date: 2022-03-24
subtitle: "How young scientists can be sensitized for Open Science"
categories: ["Interviews"]
---


<p> In this interview, Dr. Andreas Beyerlein, one of our members, is interviewed by Dr. Doreen Siegfried from the Leibniz Information Center for Economics. He talks about his teaching experiences with Open and Reproducible Science. </p>
<p><a href="https://open-science-future.zbw.eu/junge-wissenschaftlerinnen-fuer-open-science-sensibilisiert/">Read the whole interview</a></p>
<div class="g-clear"></div>
